MINI MINUTES:
Line 14

Judge Pro Tem: Toni Young; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501A)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Anson C. Freitas is present.
Attorney Jamie Bombard, Esq. of Steven Adair MacDonald & Associates (415-956-6488), counsel for the plaintiff.
Defendants Samantha Brown and Joshua Smith are present.
Attorney Pauline Farmer-Koppenol, Esq. of Fenwick & West (415-875-2300) appearing for defendant in limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Room 501A, re settlement discussions. The case is NOT settled. Settlement discussions are terminated because defendant Joshua Smith becomes verbally abusive to other parties and to the Judge Pro Tem during negotiations. Mr. Smith is escorted out of the building by sheriff deputies. The trial date of SEP-08-2014 remains on calendar.
